title: Authentic flavors from across India and beyond.
subtitle: From spicy Chettinad Chicken to aromatic Ambur Biriyani — a diverse menu crafted to satisfy every craving.

items.name: Chilli Gobhi
items.description: Crispy cauliflower tossed in spicy Indo-Chinese sauce with peppers and onions.

items.name: Gobhi Manchurian
items.description: Deep-fried cauliflower florets coated in a tangy Manchurian sauce.

items.name: Baby Corn Manchurian
items.description: Crispy baby corn in a savory Manchurian gravy with aromatic spices.

items.name: Baby Corn Chilli
items.description: Stir-fried baby corn with bell peppers in a hot chilli sauce.

items.name: Mushroom Manchurian
items.description: Button mushrooms in a rich Manchurian sauce with fresh herbs.

items.name: Mushroom Chilli
items.description: Spicy mushroom stir-fry with green chillies and garlic.

items.name: Egg Chilli
items.description: Boiled eggs tossed in a spicy chilli sauce with onions and peppers.

items.name: Balochi Chicken
items.description: Tender chicken marinated in traditional Balochi spices and grilled to perfection.

items.name: Achari Chicken
items.description: Chicken cooked with pickle spices for a tangy, bold flavor profile.

items.name: Tandoori Chicken
items.description: Classic tandoor-roasted chicken marinated in yogurt and aromatic spices.

items.name: Chicken Tikka
items.description: Succulent boneless chicken pieces marinated and grilled in tandoor.

items.name: Golden Chicken
items.description: Crispy fried chicken with a golden batter and house special seasoning.

items.name: Banjara Murg
items.description: Spicy chicken cooked in the nomadic Banjara style with rich gravy.

items.name: Mutton Pepper Dry
items.description: Tender mutton pieces dry-roasted with crushed black pepper and curry leaves.

items.name: Mutton Bhuna Roast
items.description: Slow-cooked mutton bhuna with rich caramelized onion gravy.

items.name: Andhra Mutton Fry
items.description: Spicy deep-fried mutton in fiery Andhra-style masala.

items.name: Dal Butter Fry
items.description: Creamy lentils cooked with butter and tempered with aromatic spices.

items.name: Dal Tadka
items.description: Yellow lentils tempered with cumin, garlic, and dried red chillies.

items.name: Tomato Curry
items.description: Tangy tomato-based curry with a blend of South Indian spices.

items.name: Veg Kolhapuri
items.description: Mixed vegetables in a fiery Kolhapuri masala with fresh coconut.

items.name: Kadhai Mushroom
items.description: Fresh mushrooms cooked in a kadhai with bell peppers and tomatoes.

items.name: Palak Paneer
items.description: Cottage cheese cubes in a smooth, creamy spinach gravy.

items.name: Paneer Butter Masala
items.description: Rich and creamy paneer in a buttery tomato-based gravy.

items.name: Chettinad Chicken
items.description: A flavorful delicacy from Chettinad, known for its rich spices and tender chicken.

items.name: Ambur Biriyani
items.description: A traditional biriyani celebrated for its fragrant layers and juicy meat.
